response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive full-stack and distributed-systems experience, including real-time systems and architectural work, his background lacks direct exposure to agentic AI systems, fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit risk, payment flows), and regulated environments. His recent role at re:cinq mentions AI-agent infrastructure, but the depth and scale are unclear. Leadership experience is strong, but primarily in smaller-scale or non-fintech contexts.
strengths: Proven expertise in distributed systems, microservices, and real-time data processing (e.g., Dunnhumby, RIDE Capital)
Strong engineering leadership and team scaling experience (e.g., Altom Consulting, re:cinq)
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain scalable, event-driven platforms (e.g., GISCollective)
concerns: No clear track record in agentic AI systems, particularly in production or fintech contexts
Limited exposure to fintech-specific domains (e.g., credit risk, regulatory compliance, embedded finance)
Uncertain depth of experience with LLMs, fine-tuning, or multi-agent orchestration frameworks
